summary: Recording quality unknown and the performance is considered a letdown by reviewers.
review: The sole review rates this show as mediocre (3 ★) and describes it as another disappointing entry in what appears to be a weak run of concerts. No details are given about the audio source or sound quality, so the recording’s technical merit remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate‑rating review mentions a general disappointment with the show and provides no information on recording quality, leading to a low confidence, below‑average overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No reviewer comments about sound clarity, mix, or source; cannot assess technical quality.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Reviewer indicates the concert is part of a sub‑par run of shows but gives no specifics on set structure.
